description: Conservative preservation pack for nSoftware/IPWorks Delphi components. IPWorks offers Delphi VCL and FMX support, so nonvisual networking components may be preserved when the target has the correct edition and deployment files.

rules.notes: HTTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved with an FMX-capable IPWorks edition.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify unit names, TLS/certificate handling, callbacks, and deployment libraries for the target platform.

rules.notes: REST component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review authentication, JSON/XML handling, async events, and target-platform networking.

rules.notes: FTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review TLS, passive mode, local paths, and deployment dependencies.

rules.notes: SFTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review SSH keys, host-key validation, and target-platform support.

rules.notes: SMTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review OAuth/TLS, attachments, message encoding, and async event handling.

rules.notes: POP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review OAuth/TLS and message storage behavior.

rules.notes: IMAP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review synchronization, OAuth/TLS, and background callback behavior.
OAuth redirect/browser flow may need platform-specific FMX handling.

rules.notes: JSON component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
XML component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
TCP client is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review threading, TLS, reconnect behavior, and mobile/network permissions.
Server components require platform, firewall, threading, and lifecycle review.

rules.notes: UDP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review multicast/broadcast behavior and platform network permissions.

rules.notes: WebSocket component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review TLS, threading, reconnect behavior, and target-platform support.
Certificate manager behavior can be OS-specific and requires deployment review.

rules.notes: S3 component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review credentials, regions, TLS, file paths, and background transfer behavior.
